Rule_Text: SLC7A11 = (NRF2 OR BACH1) AND NOT KEAP1
Evidence_Type: HEK293T: Warnatz 2011 ChIP-seq ✓ (BACH1 KD DECREASES SLC7A11 → activation)
Source_Tissue: HEK293T: Warnatz 2011 ChIP-seq ✓ (BACH1 KD DECREASES SLC7A11 → activation)
Cardiac_Transcriptomic_Validation: GSE193997 ✓ (ρ=+0.325, p<0.01, positive correlation = activating); GSE307385 ✓ (p<0.01); GSE240848 ✓ (snRNA-seq, p<0.001)
Cell_Type_Caveat: CRITICAL: BACH1 regulation of SLC7A11 is cell-type dependent. In HEK293T, BACH1 activates SLC7A11 (KD → decrease). In multiple cancer lines, BACH1 represses SLC7A11 (HPPE inhibition → increase; Su 2023 Nature Cancer). Cardiac transcriptomic data support activation in cardiac I/R context, but cardiac ChIP-seq validation is needed.
Key_References: Warnatz 2011: ChIP-seq ✓, BACH1 KD DECREASES SLC7A11 → BACH1 is activator in HEK293T. Su 2023: BACH1 represses SLC7A11 in cancer cells (context-dependent).
